artifact_role: Hourly-updatable register for bounded defense of branch-local recovery no-gos. It changes no claim status or verdict.
history_conflict_rule: If the same obstruction was previously cleared for the same frozen construction, stop with INTEGRITY_CONFLICT and reconcile the premises before banking or defending the new no-go.

six_axis_consideration.history_rule: Compare prior clearances by Layer-0 and L1-L7 signature before calling them same-construction clearances.
six_axis_consideration.escape_admission_rule: Swing 2 requires a completed current template, explicit axis deltas, the target bridge claim, and one first falsification test.
six_axis_consideration.underdefinition_rule: A blank or vague axis returns UNDERDEFINED and supplies neither a rescue nor class-invariance evidence.

selection_rule: Work the highest-information pending history audit and continue into Swing 1 in the same run when no integrity conflict appears and capacity remains. Complete Swing 1 for every newly admitted no-go before spending a second rescue swing on one target, unless a Swing-1 result exposes a cheap decisive test that would moot the others.
resume_rule: After the conditional unitarity certificate reaches an endpoint, resume Swing 2 and Swing 3 for every non-exhausted no-go target.
stop_rule: Accept construction-class exhaustion only after the predeclared space has been tested and any survivor has faced an adversarial twin. A legitimate reframe must explain more, not merely survive.
preservation_rule: A new survivor does not erase the original branch-local no-go. It creates a separately frozen construction candidate.

targets.title: Exact-vacuum GR residual under the W229 record-current branch

history_audit.summary: Prior work cleared the imported-vacuum linear residual and the record-current theta row, but no prior result cleared the same nonzero Q^TF(B) plus zero W229 record-current source obstruction for this frozen construction.

search_receipt.boundedness_note: Mechanism search, not exhaustive proof of every historical phrasing; sufficient to identify the material same-obstruction candidates in active GU history.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: imported Schwarzschild weak-field metric with GU-native Willmore residual bookkeeping
prior_encounters.outcome: Linear-in-M Willmore residual is identically zero by harmonicity; leading residual remains quadratic Q(B) and the verdict stays OPEN.
prior_encounters.applicability: Confirms there is no linear early-disproof signal, but explicitly leaves the quadratic residual as the standing obstruction rather than clearing it.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: principled graph-Hessian II with ambient-curvature and H-class/II-class alternatives
prior_encounters.outcome: Computes nonzero Q^TF(B), resolves the slow-falloff artifact, and identifies possible ambient or H-class balance mechanisms as different construction questions.
prior_encounters.applicability: Supports the residual's existence; possible balances require an ambient/H-class or theta-source construction not identical to the W229 record-current vacuum source tested here.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: imported exact Schwarzschild, Psi=0, conservative IG branch, computable linear slice
prior_encounters.outcome: Every built term has zero linear-in-M residual, while the leading built contribution is the quadratic Q(B) obstruction.
prior_encounters.applicability: Cheap-read compatibility at linear order; explicitly not exact GR recovery and not a cancellation of Q^TF(B).

prior_encounters.construction_fork: W229-built record-current theta equation in the Psi=0 vacuum
prior_encounters.outcome: J[Psi=0]=0 forces theta=0, so the theta-sector residual vanishes.
prior_encounters.applicability: This is part of the current obstruction: the available W229 source/YM cancellation tensor is zero, so it cannot cancel nonzero Q^TF(B).

prior_encounters.construction_fork: imported exact Kerr, Psi=0, harmonic-gauge linear-in-M slice
prior_encounters.outcome: Linear Willmore residual clears on Kerr; the O(M^2) Q(B) obstruction remains the standing higher-order issue.
prior_encounters.applicability: Extends linear cheap-read compatibility to rotation; does not clear the quadratic cancellation target.

prior_encounters.construction_fork: record-sourced induced-YM branch-3 action with screened-Poisson source law
prior_encounters.outcome: Builds the nonlocal record-current source law and localizes the W154 posit, with kappa and Z_U still normalization data.
prior_encounters.applicability: Supplies the source law used by the current no-go; it does not provide a nonzero vacuum source or a Q^TF(B) canceller.

completed_swings.summary: The no-go minimizes to the current branch's nonzero principled Schwarzschild Q^TF(B) residual plus the W229 record-current vacuum rule Psi=0 -> J=0 -> theta=0. It is not contradicted by prior linear cheap-read clears.

the W229 source law uses record current J[Psi]
Psi=0 in the imported vacuum gives J=0
finite positive screened operator gives theta=0
available source/YM cancellation tensor is zero
kappa and Z_U cannot tune a zero tensor into -Q^TF(B)

construction_space_status.status: same zero-source obstruction unless a different non-record source is supplied
different construction, eligible for Swing 2 only if stated without merging with W229
comparator only, not importable as GU dynamics

completed_swings.summary: The best already named alternative GR forks were tested as construction classes, but none supplied a source-owned cancellation tensor with the required order, trace-free slot, provenance, branch cleanliness, and first falsification test. Target-shaped stress and standard Einstein dynamics remain invalid escapes.

attempted_constructions.axis_delta: nonlocal W229 stiffness removed while record-current source law stays fixed
attempted_constructions.reason: Psi=0 still gives J[Psi]=0; a different non-record source would leave the W203/W229 branch.
attempted_constructions.first_falsification_test: Exact-vacuum Schwarzschild still has zero record current and therefore no cancellation tensor.

attempted_constructions.axis_delta: replace W154 c_kin = 0 record-current posit with an independent theta equation
attempted_constructions.reason: The current record names this as a legitimate different branch, but supplies no source-owned field equation, boundary data, normalization, or trace-free stress tensor for the Q^TF(B) slot.
attempted_constructions.first_falsification_test: A future bare-theta equation must predict an exact-vacuum source tensor before inspecting the Schwarzschild residual.

attempted_constructions.axis_delta: change the functional/ambient-curvature contribution rather than the record current
attempted_constructions.reason: Prior work maps the OQ2-A functional binary, but does not freeze the higher-codimension first variation or coefficient needed for a current cancellation tensor.
attempted_constructions.first_falsification_test: A background-subtracted higher-codimension Willmore variation must derive the ambient term and coefficient without fitting Q^TF(B).

attempted_constructions.axis_delta: use an explicit adapter assumption rather than W229 vacuum source law
attempted_constructions.reason: No frozen adapter packet supplies an exact-vacuum GR source tensor or physical state-preserving construction that cancels Q^TF(B).
attempted_constructions.first_falsification_test: A returned adapter must provide a source-owned GR tensor and fail if that tensor is zero, metric-proportional, or target-shaped.

attempted_constructions.axis_delta: none; this is the target theory
attempted_constructions.reason: Einstein dynamics supplies the benchmark, not GU dynamics. A target-shaped stress tensor is target import even when it algebraically cancels Q^TF(B).
attempted_constructions.first_falsification_test: Reject any source defined as -Q^TF(B) unless it is independently derived before target confrontation.

completed_swings.summary: Adversarial review found no reframe survivor. The tested W229/W203 record-current, bare-theta or fundamental-stiffness, ambient or H-class, boundary-adapter, and standard-Einstein comparator constructions either preserve the zero-source obstruction, lack a source-owned trace-free cancellation tensor, depend on an absent frozen adapter, or import the target dynamics.

adversarial_checks.reason: The exact-vacuum record current is zero. Adding a non-record source would leave the W203/W229 branch.
The branch is legitimate future construction space, but current records do not supply a field equation, boundary data, normalization, or trace-free tensor in the Q^TF(B) slot.
The higher-codimension first variation and coefficient are not frozen before the Schwarzschild target.
No frozen adapter packet supplies an exact-vacuum GR tensor or state-preserving construction.
Einstein dynamics is the target comparator and cannot be imported as GU dynamics.

resurrection_triggers: a trace-free exact-vacuum source tensor in the Q^TF(B) slot with GU provenance, fixed coefficient, and a first falsification test
a higher-codimension |II|^2 ambient or H-class first variation whose coefficient is frozen before using the Schwarzschild residual
a bare-theta or fundamental-stiffness field equation with boundary data, normalization, and tensor shape fixed independently of the target
a frozen boundary-adapter return that supplies an exact-vacuum GR tensor or state-preserving construction with branch conditions and provenance
completed_swings.status_boundary: No claim status, canon verdict, public posture, paper, portfolio, license, Lean, absorbed source, or cross-repo surface moved.

targets.next_question: The GR defense checkpoint is bounded negative for the tested construction space. Next eligible recovery-defense work is a Swing 2 construction attempt for RECOVERY-NOGO-COSMO-SCALAR or RECOVERY-NOGO-SM-SELECTOR unless daily stewardship changes the order.

conditional_unitarity.question: Given a precisely typed boundary adapter and favorable branch inputs, is the adapter sufficient for the frozen GU construction to produce a positive physical state space and unitary or state-preserving dynamics without further sector-specific imports?

adapter_interface.axiom: BoundaryAdapterAxiom(A): an independently supplied boundary/firewall adapter selects favorable branch conditions and supplies a positive-majorant or spectral-section interface for the frozen GU construction.

stage_results.reason: BoundaryAdapterAxiom(A) is precise enough to test conditional sufficiency.
The branch-local action fingerprint exists, but operator/domain, boundary data, quotient, and observables are not primary-theory frozen.
The source-defined gauge/BRST differential d_RS,-1, ghost bundles, gauge fixing, exact symbol complex, and physical cohomology are missing.
No Hilbert/Fock space or local algebra net with positive representation is derived from the source branch.
No GU-derived vacuum, two-point function, covariance, density matrix, or rho_AB is available.
No GU measurement postulate or local readout rule selects physical observables.
No probabilities are derived from a GU state and GU-admissible effects.
VZ/principal-symbol controls are relevant, but no live QFT-shadow microcausality or NAC certificate exists.
W169 gives finite/QM perturbative C-operator evidence; W173 leaves record/redundancy quantization dependent. No all-orders local QFT state-preserving dynamics is supplied.
Spin labels and carrier representation data do not provide a source-owned spin-statistics theorem.
Ordinary SM anomaly checks apply only after an exact observer-facing shadow and extra-mode policy are derived.

conditional_unitarity.summary: Even granting a typed boundary adapter axiom and favorable branch inputs, the current branch still lacks the source-owned quotient, state, observable, probability, locality, and dynamics certificates needed for conditional quantum recovery.
conditional_unitarity.next_question: Resume Swing 2 and Swing 3 for the registered recovery no-go targets unless daily stewardship changes the order.
